code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let tokens = string.split_whitespace(input)
let n = tokens.len()

mut best_token = ""
mut best_count = 0
mut i = 0
while i < n
  let tok = match tokens.get(i)
  when Some(t)
    t
  when None
    ""
  end
  mut is_first = true
  mut j = 0
  while j < i
    let prev = match tokens.get(j)
    when Some(p)
      p
    when None
      ""
    end
    if prev == tok
      is_first = false
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if is_first
    mut count = 0
    mut k = 0
    while k < n
      let t = match tokens.get(k)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        ""
      end
      if t == tok
        count = count + 1
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    if count > best_count
      best_count = count
      best_token = tok
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
